items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
items.author: Trevor Hastie, Robert Tibshirani, Jerome Friedman
items.note: Chapter 7 covers model assessment and the bias–variance tradeoff with prediction-error decomposition.

items.title: Neural Networks and the Bias/Variance Dilemma (Geman et al., 1992)
items.author: Stuart Geman, Elie Bienenstock, René Doursat
items.note: Foundational ML paper naming bias and variance components of learned model error.

items.title: scikit-learn: Bias-variance decomposition example
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Interactive illustration of how model complexity affects bias and variance on synthetic data.
